note_text: Wound note - Leftlowerleg. Meas 6.5x5.0x0.3cm. Heavy serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 58% gran, 42% slough. Periwound erythematous. Foam dsg changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Johansson notified.

  Wound bed: 59% slough, 41% granulation tissue. Periwound: erythematous.
  Drainage: heavy. Odor: none.
Assessment: Venous venous Left lower leg — not improving.
Plan: Continue current dressing regimen. Negative pressure wound therapy initiated.
